TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Stanley_Adams_(actor), title = Stanley_Adams_(actor), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Stanley_Adams_(actor)} }

S.FORM: Stanley Adams kawas tay 1915, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 4, Stanley Adams, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1977) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Stanley Adams kawas tay 1915, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 4, Stanley Adams, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1977) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: s~ɕtanlej a*ams~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, s~ɕtanlej a*ams~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
